name: Conquest
author: AstroWebEngine
description: Turns any base ruleset into an elimination game. Occupied bases stop producing and, if held past the threshold, are lost — disbanded (the owner keeps the structure-refund discount) by default, or transferred to the occupier. Victory goes to the last team still holding a base (your guild if you're in one, else you alone). A pure content overlay: enable it on top of any ruleset; no code runs.
